title: Sharepoint integration
excerpt: Is there an way to integrate a board with Sharepoint? I am would like to automate my board to save files on my sharepoint page.

posts.author: lucas.pacheco (Lucas Pacheco)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an way to integrate a board with Sharepoint? I am would like to automate my board to save files on my sharepoint page.

posts.author: leonidas (Leonidas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just found this but haven’t tried it yet: monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

Let me know if you find another way to do it I’m looking as well, ideally within monday.com to avoid the extra cyber security exposure and less so the additional expense.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi folks

Our Microsoft 365 Office Embedded app has automation to do this.

image3104×1612 394 KB

Details of the automation including a video demo are available in the docs here:

monday-help.dsapps.dev

Automations

Currently there is a single automation. In the automation center, search for “Microsoft 365”: This works with the Secure Embed • Microsoft 365 item...

We are actively building out more automations, so I am very happy to hear your use cases for automating monday.com and Microsoft 365 / Sharepoint workflows.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lucas

To integrate your board with SharePoint and automate the process of saving files, we’ll implement a solution using Microsoft Power Automate. This tool will allow us to create workflows that trigger based on specific actions on your board, such as when a new file is uploaded or updated. These workflows will then automate the file transfer to your designated SharePoint library. This process ensures that all your important documents are consistently and accurately backed up on SharePoint without manual intervention.

Key steps in our approach:

  • Set up triggers in Power Automate to monitor your board for file changes.
  • Create workflows that copy or move these files to SharePoint.
  • Ensure proper file organization and version control within SharePoint.
